query: UPDATE wa_conversations c INNER JOIN wa_contacts ct ON c.sessionId = ct.sessionId AND c.remoteJid = ct.jid SET c.contactPushName = ct.pushName WHERE ct.pushName IS NOT NULL AND ct.pushName != '' AND (c.contactPushName IS NULL OR c.contactPushName = '' OR c.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9]+$')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute UPDATE wa_conversations c INNER JOIN wa_contacts ct ON c.sessionId = ct.sessionId AND c.remoteJid = ct.jid SET c.contactPushName = ct.pushName WHERE ct.pushName IS NOT NULL AND ct.pushName != '' AND (c.contactPushName IS NULL OR c.contactPushName = '' OR c.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9]+$')
